Title: Valid login
Steps:
1. Go to saucedemo.com 
2. Enter standard_user / secret_sauce 
3. Click Login
Expected Result: User is taken to the Products page
Actual Result: Redirected to Products page successfully, all products visible

Title: Invalid Password
Expected Result: Error message appears, user stays on login page
Actual Result:
It displays :
"Epic sadface: Username and password do not match any user in this service"
and stay's on the login page

Title: Empty Username Field
Steps:
1. Leave username blank 
2. Enter password 
3. Click Login
Actual Result:
It displays :
"Epic sadface: Username is required"
and stay's on the login page

Title: Empty Password Field
Steps:
1. Enter username 
2. Leave password blank 
3. Click Login
Actual Result:
It displays :
"Epic sadface: Password is required"
and stay's on the login page

Title: Locked-Out User
Expected Result: Error: "Sorry, this user has been locked out"
Actual Result:
It displays :
"Epic sadface: Sorry, this user has been locked out."
and stay's on the login page

Title: Add single item to cart
Steps:
1. Login as standard_user 
2. Click "Add to cart" on any product

Title: Remove item from cart
Actual Result: Item removed from cart, cart icon returned to empty state showing no count"

Title: Sort Products by price (Low to High)
Steps:
1. Go to Products page 
2. Select "Price (low to high)" from sort dropdown
Expected Result: Products display in ascending price order
Actual Result: The products are sorted by  low to high price

Title: Checkout without valid info
Steps:
1. Add item to cart 
2. Click Checkout 
3. Enter name, zip, postal code 
4. Click Continue
Expected Result: User proceeds to order overview page
Actual Result: User proceeds to order overview page where all the information are displayed

Title: Checkout with missing info
Steps:
1. Click Checkout 
2. Leave "First Name" blank 
3. Click Continue
Actual Result: it displays "Error: First Name is required" and stay's on the same page

Title: Logout Functionality
Expected Result: User is returned to login page
Actual Result: User gets logged out of the website and returns to the login page
